items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that 'Auto-start settings (host must join first)' is satisfied. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this specific requirement. As a result, it is unclear whether the requirement is met, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
